description: Whetstone evaluation dataset — labelled signals and mutation ranking pairs

signals.text: No, I meant the other file
Actually, use the node runner not SSH
That's wrong, the amount is $50k not $30k
Wrong tool, use curl instead of wget
I said British English, not American
What the fuck is this garbage
I already told you three times
WHY DO YOU KEEP DOING THIS
This is completely unusable
Are you even reading what I write?
Let me just do it myself
Forget it, I'll handle the deployment
Give me access, I'll fix this
The command failed with exit code 1
API returned 500 internal server error again
Connection refused on port 3000
Make it more concise, this is too wordy
Use tables not bullet points
Perfect, exactly what I needed
That's spot on, great work
You've misunderstood the entire requirement
Stop guessing and read the documentation
The build is broken again, third time today
Never mind, I'll write the script myself
This is much better than before
You presented a roadmap as if it were shipped
Don't use em dashes, I've told you this
The database migration failed silently
I'm taking over this task from here
Excellent analysis, keep going

better.content: Before running remote commands, check if the node runner is available

worse.content: Always use SSH for remote commands

mutation_pairs.reason: Better mutation addresses root cause, worse mutation entrenches the bad pattern

better.content: Write key facts to SESSION-STATE.md before responding

mutation_pairs.reason: Better mutation creates durable memory, worse mutation is vague and unactionable
Better mutation is specific and testable, worse is vague

better.content: Never present roadmaps as shipped features. Verify every claimed feature is actually implemented.

mutation_pairs.reason: Better mutation is specific and actionable, worse is vague

better.content: When a task is delegated, check for new output every 10 minutes. No output = stalled.

mutation_pairs.reason: Better mutation has specific criteria and timeline, worse is unactionable
